name: zer0inf
description: Zero-knowledge proof of correct AI inference on Stellar Soroban

scripts.demo: echo '=== Zer0Inf Demo ===' && rm -f output/*.json && echo '' && node prover/dist/cli/index.js register data/sample-weights.json --description 'Demo Credit Model' && echo '' && node prover/dist/cli/index.js infer && echo '' && node prover/dist/cli/index.js verify --proof output/proof.json && echo '' && node prover/dist/cli/index.js status
